name: brand-voice
description: Enforce brand writing guidelines in Claude Code — PostToolUse hook + MCP server
long_description:
brand-voice enforces your brand writing guidelines automatically as Claude writes Markdown.

**Features:**
- PostToolUse hook intercepts every Write/Edit/MultiEdit on .md/.mdx files
- Checks forbidden terms, avoid terms, sentence length, passive voice, and readability grade
- Exits with code 2 on violations so Claude auto-corrects before saving
- MCP server with analyze_readability (read-only) and apply_suggestions (word-level fixes)
- CLI for CI pipelines: check, baseline ratchet, GitHub PR annotations
- /brand-voice-setup skill for guided onboarding — reads existing brand docs or interviews in 4 questions
- Visual identity support: colors, fonts, and logo URLs in the same guidelines file

tools.name: analyze_readability
tools.description: Check a Markdown file or inline text for brand-voice violations and readability scores. Returns violations (line, severity, rule, message), Flesch/FK metrics, and visual identity palette. Read-only, idempotent.

tools.name: apply_suggestions
tools.description: Apply safe word-level substitutions to fix forbidden/avoid terms (e.g. utilize→use, leverage→use). Supports dryRun to preview as a diff. Idempotent, does not fix sentence length or passive voice.
